title: Build UI: / (HUD) and /record pages
description: Build the React UI for the HUD (home page) displaying current mode, mic level, model status, and the /record page for long-form recording with transcript display and file rotation status. Use TanStack Router for navigation.

title: Unit tests: audio capture and silence detection
description: Per PLAN.md section 12: Tests: unit (audio capture, silence detection). Tests for cpal audio capture initialization, device enumeration, resampling to 16kHz mono, RMS silence detection with configurable threshold, buffer management for long sessions, VAD-lite behavior for toggle mode auto-stop. Acceptance: All tests pass, coverage includes edge cases.

title: Bootstrap Tauri v2 app with React + TanStack Router
close_reason: Implementation complete: Tauri v2 app bootstrapped with React + TanStack Router, prefs.rs, main.rs, db.rs (SQLite + FTS5), and keys.rs (hotkey detection) all implemented.

title: Implement Rust: keys.rs for hotkey detection
close_reason: Implementation complete: Tauri v2 app bootstrapped with React + TanStack Router, prefs.rs, main.rs, db.rs (SQLite + FTS5), and keys.rs (hotkey detection) all implemented.

title: Unit tests: security and permissions handling
description: Per PLAN.md section 12: Tests: unit (security and permissions). Tests for microphone permission prompt and detection, accessibility permission detection for typing, mute in password fields heuristic, tray global disable toggle, graceful degradation when permissions denied. Acceptance: All tests pass, coverage includes permission denial edge cases.

title: Unit tests: database CRUD and FTS5 queries
description: Per PLAN.md section 12: Tests: unit (database). Per PLAN.md section 'Data Storage', uses SQLite at ~/Library/Application Support/sst/sst.db with FTS5. Tests session creation, entry insertion, retrieval by session_id, FTS5 full-text search, timestamps, word/char counts, migration applied on startup. Acceptance: All tests pass.

title: Unit tests: text post-processing and voice commands
description: Per PLAN.md section 12: Tests: unit (text post-processing). Per PLAN.md section 'Whisper Integration', post-processing normalizes whitespace, ASCII punctuation, voice commands. Tests text normalization (whitespace, punctuation), voice command mapping (newline, tab, punctuation, quotes, code blocks), edge cases (empty input, special characters). Acceptance: All tests pass.

title: Integration tests: end-to-end PTT workflow
description: Per PLAN.md section 12: Tests: unit (integration). Per PLAN.md section 'Typical Workflow Sequence', tests full hold-to-talk workflow: hotkey press -> audio capture -> whisper transcription -> voice command mapping -> keystroke output -> DB persistence. Tests toggle mode: start -> capture -> 3s silence auto-stop -> type. Verifies no stray modifiers in typed text. Acceptance: All workflow paths pass.

title: Build UI: /settings page
close_reason: Built /settings page with all preference settings: activation, model, typing, voice commands, and recording

title: Unit tests: hotkey detection (L/R modifiers)
description: Per PLAN.md section 12: Tests: unit (hotkeys). Per PLAN.md section 'Hotkeys', uses rdev for L/R modifier detection. Tests left/right modifier detection, hold mode state machine (start on both down, stop on release), toggle mode chord detection, debounce logic, release-before-type guard verification, modifier-only activation. Acceptance: All tests pass.

title: Implement Rust: prefs.rs and main.rs
close_reason: Implementation complete: Tauri v2 app bootstrapped with React + TanStack Router, prefs.rs, main.rs, db.rs (SQLite + FTS5), and keys.rs (hotkey detection) all implemented.

title: Unit tests: record mode chunking and rotation
description: Per PLAN.md section 12: Tests: unit (record mode). Per PLAN.md section 'Record Mode Bounds', long-form recording creates sessions with mode='record', chunks audio every 60s, auto-rotates on maxHours (8) or maxFileGB (4). Tests session/file rotation, writes to rolling .txt file, no typing to apps during record mode. Acceptance: All tests pass, rotation works correctly.

title: Unit tests: React UI components
description: Per PLAN.md section 12: Tests: unit (React UI). Per PLAN.md section 'UI', uses TanStack Router and TanStack Table. Tests HUD displays current mode/mic level/model, Settings form validation and persistence, Logs table sorting/filtering/pagination, Record page transcript display and file rotation status, route navigation. Acceptance: All tests pass.

title: Manual QA: hotkeys, hold/toggle, voice commands, record mode
description: Per PLAN.md section 13: Manual QA. Tests: (1) Both L/R Cmd+Opt combos work, release-before-type guard, (2) Hold mode capture->transcribe->type without stray modifiers, (3) Toggle 3.0s silence auto-stop with adjustable threshold, (4) Voice commands map to keys/punctuation, (5) Logs searchable with export, (6) Record mode hours-long session rotates cleanly, (7) No socket opens / CSP blocks connections, (8) Mic + Accessibility prompts appear. Acceptance: All manual tests pass.

title: Implement local speech-to-text with whisper-rs
description:
Added local speech-to-text capability using whisper-rs with Metal GPU acceleration for Apple Silicon.

**Added:**
- stt.rs module: Model loading (3 profiles), transcription, voice commands, SHA256 verification
- lib.rs commands: load_model, transcribe, is_model_loaded
- Dependencies: whisper-rs (metal), sha2, hex

**Tauri Commands:**
- load_model(profile) - Load whisper model into memory
- transcribe(audio_data) - Run transcription on audio float array
- is_model_loaded() - Check if model is ready

**Model Options:**
- English Small (~75MB) - Fastest, English-only
- Multilingual Small (~75MB) - Fast, any language  
- Multilingual Medium (~250MB) - Slower, better accuracy

Uses Metal framework for GPU inference on M1/M2/M3 chips.

description: Per PLAN.md section 12: Tests: unit (preferences). Per PLAN.md section 'Preferences & Files', config stored at ~/Library/Application Support/sst/config.json. Tests config loading from JSON, saving, validation of hotkeys, silence thresholds, model profiles, typing options, voice commands enabled/map, record settings. Acceptance: All tests pass, validation rejects invalid configs.

title: Implement Rust: stt.rs whisper integration
close_reason: Implemented whisper-rs integration in stt.rs module with model loading, transcription, and voice commands

title: Use shared whisper model location
description:
Per PLAN.md section 'Preferences & Files', models dir should use XDG cache location for shared model storage. Currently uses app-specific directory which prevents cross-app model sharing (other apps may also use whisper.cpp with same models). Update prefs.rs get_models_dir() to use XDG cache directory (ProjectDirs from com.whisper.shared).API Location: apps/web/src-tauri/src/prefs.rs - get_models_dir() function.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Models stored in ~/.cache/whisper/models/
- [ ] Compatible with other whisper.cpp apps using same location
- [ ] Config still works with existing models if any
- [ ] Existing users can migrate by moving model files

title: Unit tests: typing output and clipboard fallback
description: Test enigo keystroke synthesis, modifier release guard, throttle per char, clipboard fallback for secure fields, newline append option
close_reason: Complete - implemented: enigo keystroke synthesis, modifier release guard, throttle per char, clipboard fallback, newline append, code context detection (text heuristics + macOS accessibility API), password field detection (macOS AX API)

title: Write tests and perform QA
close_reason: Split into individual test tasks: stt-527, stt-atk, stt-51g, stt-ces, stt-8rv

title: Build UI: /settings page - model management
description:
Model management UI for /settings page. Per PLAN.md section 'Preferences & Files', models dir is ~/Library/Application Support/sst/models/ with verification via SHA-256.

This task adds Tauri commands to lib.rs - MUST be implemented BEFORE any React UI that consumes these commands (API surface dependency).

API Location: commands go in apps/web/src-tauri/src/lib.rs, ModelInfo struct in apps/web/src-tauri/src/stt.rs.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Settings shows model status for small.en, multilingual-small, multilingual-medium
- Each profile shows filename, expected SHA-256, installation status
- Verify button computes SHA-256 vs expected
- Current loaded model displayed
- Links to https://huggingface.co/ggerganov/whisper.cpp

title: Implement Rust: audio.rs for mic capture
description: Implement audio.rs for microphone capture using cpal. Handle device enumeration, initialization, resampling to 16kHz mono format for Whisper, RMS silence detection with configurable threshold, buffer management for long sessions, and support VAD-lite behavior for toggle mode auto-stop.

title: Unit tests: model loading and SHA-256 verification
description: Per PLAN.md section 12: Tests: unit (model loading). Per PLAN.md section 'Whisper Integration', uses whisper-rs with Metal when supported else CPU. Tests whisper model loading from path, SHA-256 file verification against known checksums, profile selection (small.en, multilingual-small, multilingual-medium), Metal fallback to CPU, context reuse across sessions, missing/invalid model error handling. Acceptance: All tests pass, Metal fallback works.

title: Wire Tauri commands end-to-end
description: Wire Tauri commands end-to-end: connect the React UI to the Rust core by implementing commands for start/stop capture, transcribe audio, insert typed text, read/write preferences, database queries, and export file dialogs. This bridges the frontend with the audio capture, whisper transcription, keystroke output, and SQLite persistence layers.
